subject.description: White man, early 30s, slightly asymmetrical face, natural skin imperfections — mild redness on cheeks, faint forehead lines, visible pores, slight bags under eyes. Wearing a plain dark navy hoodie. Hair slightly disheveled, not styled. No makeup, no grooming. Looks like a real person, not a model.
subject.action: Holding the phone up to record himself. Looking directly into the front-facing camera lens with a flat, slightly exasperated expression — the face right before someone starts a rant. Not smiling. Not performing.

setting.location: Inside a parked car. Headrest and window visible behind him. Grey fabric car interior. Midday light coming through the windshield — slightly harsh and unflattering.
setting.time_of_day: Midday — bright, slightly overexposed natural sunlight through car windows.

composition.camera_angle: Slightly high angle — front-facing camera selfie perspective. Subject is holding the phone above eye level, looking up into it.
composition.framing: Medium close-up — head and shoulders. Top of head fully in frame with minimal headspace. Chin fully visible with breathing room. Slightly off-center as if handheld and unsteady.

camera_settings.depth_of_field: wide — background car interior partially in focus

lighting.type: Harsh natural sunlight through windshield — uncontrolled, slightly unflattering, creates minor shadows under nose and chin. No fill light whatsoever.
lighting.color_grading: No color grading. Natural phone white balance — slightly cool, slight overexposure on forehead. Looks unedited straight from camera roll.

mood: Quietly fed up. The split second before someone says something they've been holding in. Relatable frustration, not theatrical anger.
aesthetic_style: Shot on iPhone front-facing camera. Grainy sensor noise visible. Slightly overexposed highlights. Compressed JPEG quality. No post-processing, no editing app filters. Looks like a raw video still from a TikTok or Instagram story.
